title: Today's Tech Brief: House of the Dragon S3 trailer revels in dragons, fire, and blood
summary: A look at the latest tech headlines, including the House of the Dragon S3 trailer and a critical RCE bug in Gogs.
imageAlt: Image from source article for House of the Dragon S3 trailer revels in dragons, fire, and blood
imageCaption: House of the Dragon S3 trailer revels in dragons, fire, and blood
imageSourceTitle: House of the Dragon S3 trailer revels in dragons, fire, and blood

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to your tech brief. I am looking at some interesting developments in the world of technology, and I'm excited to share them with you.

First up, the highly anticipated House of the Dragon Season 3 trailer has dropped, and it's a real treat for fans of dragons, fire, and blood. The show has been a hit on HBO, and the new trailer suggests that the next season will be just as action-packed and dramatic. My read is that the show's creators are really leaning into the fantasy elements that make the series so popular.

On a more serious note, a critical remote code execution bug has been discovered in Gogs, an open-source Git service. The bug, which was reported in March, allows attackers to execute arbitrary code on vulnerable systems. What's concerning is that there's no fix yet, and an exploit module has already been released. This is a good reminder of the importance of keeping software up to date and being mindful of security vulnerabilities.

I also came across news that some viewers were disappointed with the second season of House of the Dragon, but it seems like the show's creators are taking that feedback to heart. Meanwhile, in the world of cybersecurity, it's always interesting to see how quickly exploit modules can be developed for newly discovered vulnerabilities.

My quick read: today's tech stories are less about one giant thunderclap and more about a lively weather pattern. A little platform drama here, a little artificial intelligence irony there, and suddenly the industry has enough material for a very caffeinated morning show.

sources.title: House of the Dragon S3 trailer revels in dragons, fire, and blood
No fix yet for critical RCE bug in open-source Git service Gogs - exploit module is out
